use_cases: Landing page hero sections with prominent CTAs
Marketing website headers with call-to-action buttons
Product showcase entry points with primary actions
SaaS landing pages with feature highlights
ai_summary: A hero page component from Ruixen.UI designed for landing and marketing pages. Features a clean minimalist design with subtle shadows and smooth transitions. Includes multiple button variants for primary, secondary, and ghost CTAs. Built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Optimized for both desktop and mobile platforms.
